title: Trails&Tales Backport (1.20 Backport)
description: Trails&Tales Backport is a mod that adds new content presented at minecraft live 2022 for minecraft version 1.20!
body:
### _Trails&Tales Backport is a mod that adds new content presented at minecraft live 2022 for minecraft version 1.20_

![logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7ec44354e885cee3c824bd4b4d7c8abc520641ec.png)

_Content added to the Mod:_

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>
  
## Blocks:
  
### Bamboo stuff:

- Bamboo block
- Stripped bamboo block
- Bamboo planks
- Bamboo mosaic
- Bamboo slab
- Bamboo mosaic slab
- Bamboo stairs
- Bamboo mosaic stairs
- Bamboo door
- Bamboo trapdoor
- Bamboo fence
- Bamboo fence gate
- Bamboo pressure plate
- Bamboo button
 
### Cherry stuff:

- Cherry log
- Stripped cherry log
- Cherry wood
- Stripped cherry wood
- Cherry planks
- Cherry slab
- Cherry stairs
- Cherry door
- Cherry trapdoor
- Cherry fence
- Cherry fence gate
- Cherry pressure plate
- Cherry button
- Cherry leaves

### Other stuff:

- Chiseled bookshelf
- Sniffer egg
- Decorated pots:
  - Regular decorated pot
  (Pots bellow are accessable ONLY IN CREATIVE)
  - Archer pot
  - Arms-up pot
  - Burn pot
  - Danger pot
  - Heart pot
  - Heartbreak pot
  - Howl pot
  - Prize pot
  - Snort pot

## Plants:

- Pink petals
- Torchflower (as a crop and as a flower)
- Cherry sapling

## Biomes:

- Cherry Grove
- Mobs:
- Sniffer
- Bamboo raft (temporarely removed)

## Achievements:

- Little sniffs
- Smells interesting
- Planting the past
- Careful restoration

## Languages:

- ENG - 100%
- RUS - 70%

## Supported versions:

Forge:
- 1.19.2
- 1.19.4


</details>
